title: East Midlands Probation Service action plans and response letters
body: "HMPPS action plans and response letters published following the HMIP inspection of East Midland Probation Service.  This includes:    An inspection of probation services – East Midlands region (published August 2025)   An inspection of probation services in Derby City PDU   An inspection of probation services in Derbyshire PDU   An inspection of probation services in East and West Lincolnshire PDU   An inspection of probation services in Leicester, Leicestershire and Rutland PDU   An inspection of probation services in Nottingham City PDU   An inspection of probation services in Nottinghamshire  PDU    "
